query:
SELECT tenant_id, 
  CASE WHEN guiding_principles_json IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'HAS DATA' END AS principles,
  CASE WHEN wont_do_json IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'HAS DATA' END AS wont_do,
  CASE WHEN outcomes_json IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'HAS DATA' END AS outcomes
FROM ail_org_context
WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant-acme-ltd';
